name: American Megatrends International, LLC
h1: American Megatrends International's GCC footprint in India
lede: American Megatrends International runs four capability centers across three Indian cities. Chennai, Coimbatore and Kolkata, covering CoE, manufacturing and R&D, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one American Megatrends International office in India. We map four, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: American Megatrends International GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: American Megatrends International runs 4 verified GCC centers across 3 Indian cities (Chennai, Coimbatore, Kolkata), covering CoE, manufacturing and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: American Megatrends International's India footprint covers Chennai, Coimbatore and Kolkata, spanning CoE, manufacturing and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D and Customer Support for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 71 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does American Megatrends International operate in India?
faq.a: American Megatrends International operates 4 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does American Megatrends International have GCC centers in?
faq.a: American Megatrends International's India GCC footprint spans Chennai, Coimbatore and Kolkata.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does American Megatrends International run in India?
faq.a: American Megatrends International runs CoE, manufacturing and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at American Megatrends International's India GCCs?
faq.a: American Megatrends International's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads American Megatrends International's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 71 leaders at American Megatrends International's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
